differential_diagnoses: Autoimmune hepatitis or systemic rheumatologic disease
Post-acute sequelae of SARS-CoV-2 (PASC) with autonomic dysfunction
next_steps: Perform cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMRI) with late gadolinium enhancement
Obtain serum serology for Borrelia burgdorferi (ELISA and confirmatory Western blot)
Perform a 24-hour Holter monitor or loop recording to characterize rhythm disturbances
Obtain transthoracic echocardiogram to assess wall motion and structural function
Consult cardiology for evaluation of heart block and potential need for electrophysiology study
Evaluate liver enzymes trends and consider ANA, ASMA, and IgG levels to rule out autoimmune hepatitis
Maintain telemetry monitoring for progression of conduction system disease

differential_diagnoses: Toxic hepatitis (secondary to herbal supplement use)
Post-acute sequelae of SARS-CoV-2 (PASC) with autonomic dysfunction
next_steps: Perform cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMRI) with late gadolinium enhancement
Obtain transthoracic echocardiogram to assess structural function and wall motion
Repeat Borrelia burgdorferi serology (ELISA and Western blot)
Obtain Coxiella burnetii titers given sheep exposure
Comprehensive medication and supplement reconciliation with toxicological consideration
Maintain telemetry monitoring for progression of high-degree AV block
Evaluate liver enzyme trends and perform focused autoimmune liver panel (ANA, ASMA, IgG)
Consult cardiology for formal electrophysiology evaluation
